title: Burning Bound Blitz
description: Weapons with character: fighting styles, ultimates, elements and visual effects.
body:
Currently, several weapons have been added to the mod — each with its own atmosphere, mechanics, and purpose. But this is only the beginning. Even more awaits you beyond the horizon.

## The content that is already there:

<details>
<summary>🔥Fire claymores</summary>

![Fire claymores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d323055d438e53a5584face86dbefd801ac97d60.png)

Heavy two-handed swords infused with elemental fire.
Each claymore is designed with visual weight and unique attack behavior.

</details>


<details>
<summary>🌠Sky bows</summary>


![Sky bows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/400c6362683d070737801bd0ed731473ef4bf0ca.png)
</details>



## In the future:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **More types of weapons**
- **A unique weapon crafting system**
- **Bosses**

</details>
